settings.label: Diretta Target
settings.description: Target index (run 'sudo slim2diretta --list-targets' to find available targets)

settings.label: LMS Server
settings.description: LMS server IP address. Empty = auto-discovery.

settings.label: Player Name
settings.description: Player name shown in LMS. Empty = hostname.

settings.label: Decoder Backend
settings.description: Audio decoder: native (libFLAC) or ffmpeg. FFmpeg may sound different due to its internal processing pipeline.

settings.label: Verbose Logging
settings.description: Enable debug logging output

settings.label: Audio Core(s)
settings.description: Pin SDK worker + Diretta hot path to CPU core(s). Single core (e.g. '3') or comma-separated list (e.g. '3,4'). Empty = no pinning.

settings.label: Decode Core(s)
settings.description: Pin the audio/decode thread (HTTP receive + decode → push to ring buffer) to CPU core(s). When set, that thread is also raised to SCHED_FIFO. Single core or comma-separated list. Empty = falls back to Other Core(s).

settings.label: Other Core(s)
settings.description: Pin main + slimproto threads to CPU core(s). Also used as fallback for the decode thread if Decode Core(s) is empty. Single core or comma-separated list. Empty = no pinning.

settings.label: PCM Buffer (seconds)
settings.description: PCM ring buffer size in seconds. Empty = default (0.5s).

settings.label: DSD Buffer (seconds)
settings.description: DSD ring buffer size in seconds. Empty = default (0.8s).

settings.label: PCM Prefill (ms)
settings.description: PCM prefill duration before playback starts. Empty = default (80ms).

settings.label: DSD Prefill (ms)
settings.description: DSD prefill duration before playback starts. Empty = default (200ms).

settings.label: RT Priority (SCHED_FIFO)
settings.description: Real-time priority for the audio worker thread (1-99). Higher = more priority. Default: 50. Translated to --rt-priority CLI; only affects slim2diretta's audio worker thread, not the rest of the system.

settings.label: Thread Mode
settings.description: SDK thread scheduling bitmask: 1=Critical, 2=NoShortSleep, 4=NoSleep4Core, 8=SocketNoBlock, 16=Occupied, 2048=NoSleepForce, 8192=NoJumboFrame

settings.label: Transfer Mode
settings.description: Packet sizing and scheduling strategy

settings.label: Cycle Time (us)
settings.description: Max packet transmission cycle time in microseconds. Empty = auto-calculated.

settings.label: Cycle Min Time (us)
settings.description: Min cycle time in microseconds (random mode only)

settings.label: Info Cycle (us)
settings.description: Info packet cycle time in microseconds (default: 100000 = 100ms)

settings.label: Target Profile Limit (us)
settings.description: 0 = SelfProfile (stable, default), >0 = TargetProfile with auto-adaptation (experimental)

settings.label: MTU Override (bytes)
settings.description: Force specific MTU. Empty = auto-detect. Common values: 1500, 4096, 9000
